summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for unread communication badges, recurring smart invite reminders, and courtyards/gatherings regression flows using public preview URL.

ui_bugs.issue: Courtyards-level unread badges for announcements/chat do not render even when sidebar unread badge shows pending unread (reproducible with fresh seeded data).

integration_issues.flow: Unread badges on Courtyards page cards
integration_issues.issue: Sidebar unread badge appears before entering Courtyards and clears after entering, but Courtyards page-level announcement/chat unread badges remain absent during that transition.

action_items: Fix Courtyards unread badge rendering logic so announcement/chat unread indicators are visible on Courtyards page cards when unread exists before read-marking completes.
Recheck Courtyards load flow for double-fetch/auto-clear behavior (announcement list read-mark + auto room open) so card badges align with sidebar unread state.
Retest with a fresh invited member: expect sidebar unread > 0, courtyards card badges visible initially, then clear after announcements list and chat room view are processed.
critical_code_review_comments: Potential UX regression in unread flow: GET /api/announcements mutates read state immediately and CourtyardsPage auto-views first chat room on load, which can clear unread before on-page unread card badges become visible.
backend/server.py remains oversized (>700 lines), increasing regression risk across auth/courtyard/gathering/communications domains.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST host/member communities and recurring events via public APIs (script: /app/tests/seed_unread_ui_data.py) to validate member unread + reminder scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite currently passes 32/32, including new unread/reminder coverage. Frontend repro is stable: sidebar Courtyards unread badge shows before visiting /courtyards, clears after opening /courtyards, but Courtyards card-level unread badges are not rendered (fresh seed validated twice). Gatherings reminder card appears for invited member when given adequate load time.
rca of the issue: RCA hypothesis: Courtyards page mount flow combines immediate read-side effects (GET /announcements marks all as read, auto-selection/view of first chat room marks messages read) with render timing; unread can be cleared before card-level badge UI captures and displays transitional unread counts. Repro: seed one unread announcement + one unread chat message for invited member, login as member, observe sidebar unread badge >0, navigate to /courtyards, observe nav badge clears but card-level unread badges remain absent. Mitigation: decouple read-marking from initial fetch or preserve pre-read unread snapshot in UI state before mutating reads, then clear after explicit view acknowledgement.
